mano_cua.result_summary: 本地应用编译失败(bootstrap esm解析错误)无法渲染页面。mano-cua通过GitHub源码确认Source Code按钮在SiteWrapper中通过navItems prop传入，非SiteHeader硬编码。但因页面未渲染，无法通过GUI验证
mano_cua.last_reasoning: SiteHeader component accepts navItems as prop (React.Node), Source Code button is provided externally in SiteWrapper.react.js through headerProps.navItems. Not hardcoded in SiteHeader. Local app failed to compile due to bootstrap module parse error.
